action_set_definitions.name: search_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the patient or trial registry for entities matching specific criteria. Use this to retrieve unique identifiers (patient_id or trial_id).

criteria.description: Key-value pairs representing search attributes (e.g., diagnosis, phase, study_type).

action_set_definitions.name: get_trial_criteria
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the detailed inclusion and exclusion criteria for a specific clinical trial, structured by evaluation stage.

trial_id.description: The unique identifier for the clinical trial.

action_set_definitions.name: get_clinical_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves specific clinical data for a patient within a specified time range. Required for evidence-based matching.

data_category.description: The category of clinical data to retrieve.

min_date.description: The earliest record date allowed (ISO 8601 format, YYYY-MM-DD).

action_set_definitions.name: record_screening_outcome
action_set_definitions.description: Logs the final determination, failure stage, and classification for the screening process.

failure_classification.description: Specific reason for disqualification (e.g., 'Age out of range', 'Missing LOINC data').

state_description.patient_profile: The structured clinical data of the target patient, including demographics, diagnoses, biomarkers, and medication history.
state_description.trial_registry: A collection of available clinical trials, each containing detailed inclusion and exclusion criteria, trial phase, and study goals.
state_description.screening_log: A record of trials the Agent has already evaluated and the outcome of specific criteria checks performed so far.

trial_registry.title: Phase III Cardiovascular Outcomes Study for GLP-1 Agonists
